understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based level, reach goal cells, and complete them by matching the goal's required shape, color, and rotation with your carried piece. To achieve this, you must step on modifier tiles that change those attributes. Each level contains one or more goals; completing all goals advances to the next level, and winning all levels completes the game. Stamina and lives limit the number of moves you can make.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is played on a 2D grid with walls that block movement. The player starts with a piece that has a shape, color, and rotation. Goal cells have specific requirements for all three attributes. The piece's attributes can be altered by stepping on special tiles: shape modifiers cycle through shapes, color modifiers cycle through colors, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal is activated when the player steps onto it with all attributes matching exactly. Moving consumes stamina; when stamina reaches zero, a life is lost and stamina resets. Losing all lives ends the game. The player must plan a path to collect necessary modifications before reaching the goal, avoiding unnecessary backtracking to conserve stamina.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based level, reach goal cells, and complete them by matching the goal's required shape, color, and rotation with your carried piece. To achieve this, you must step on modifier tiles that change those attributes. Each level contains one or more goals; completing all goals advances to the next level, and winning all levels completes the game. Stamina and lives limit the number of moves you can make.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is played on a 2D grid with walls that block movement. The player starts with a piece that has a shape, color, and rotation. Goal cells have specific requirements for all three attributes. The piece's attributes can be altered by stepping on special tiles: shape modifiers cycle through shapes, color modifiers cycle through colors, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. A goal is activated when the player steps onto it with all attributes matching exactly. Moving consumes stamina; when stamina reaches zero, a life is lost and stamina resets. Losing all lives ends the game. The player must plan a path to collect necessary modifications before reaching the goal, avoiding unnecessary backtracking to conserve stamina.
